hero.label: APPLICATION
hero.title: Begin Your Journey
hero.subtitle: Join our global community and experience transformative training in Korea.

steps.label: HOW TO APPLY
steps.title: Application Process
steps.s1_desc: Review the program dates and estimate your financial preparation.
steps.s2_desc: Gather your passport, pastor's recommendation, and personal testimony.
steps.s3_desc: Fill out our online Google Form to start the process.

info.label: WHAT YOU NEED
info.title: Application Information
info.cost_desc: Includes accommodation, meals, lectures, and activities.
info.duration_desc: Choose the duration that fits your situation.
info.docs_desc: Submit documents together with your application form.

cta.label: START YOUR JOURNEY
cta.title: Apply Online
cta.desc: Click the button below to submit your application form.
